name: quickbite-backend
description: Backend de QuickBite — API Gateway + 5 microservicios

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd gateway && npm install && cd ../services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../restaurant-service && npm install && cd ../menu-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd gateway && npm run dev" "cd services/auth-service && npm run dev" "cd services/restaurant-service && npm run dev" "cd services/menu-service && npm run dev" "cd services/order-service && npm run dev" "cd services/user-service && npm run dev"
